title: Show HN: Computable – Buy, sell, and redeem GPU for the exact weeks you want
excerpt: Hey we are Computable. We spent years building trading infrastructure at Jump Trading and Coinbase. From that point of view, compute looks like energy markets before 2000: everything trades through private bilateral leases, there’s no visible price, and nothing can be resold. The same H100 rents at a 2x spread depending on who’s asking, and once you sign a 24-month lease, it can never change hands.
content_html:
Hey we are Computable. We spent years building trading infrastructure at Jump Trading and Coinbase. From that point of view, compute looks like energy markets before 2000: everything trades through private bilateral leases, there’s no visible price, and nothing can be resold. The same H100 rents at a 2x spread depending on who’s asking, and once you sign a 24-month lease, it can never change hands.

So we built a market for GPU nodes, sold by the calendar week. Here are three things you can do on it that you can’t do anywhere else:

- Buy exactly the weeks you need. Three nodes for the last two weeks of October means you pay for those two weeks and walk away when the run is done. You don't have to commit to 6-24 months, and there's no flexibility premium.

- Sell back what you don’t use. If your plans change, unused weeks turn back into cash: we keep a market quote posted on every position, so there’s always a price to hit.

- Buy (or sell) the future. Lock January in July at a price you set, so the cost of a future run is known before another 40% H100 rate jump makes it not.

The first auction is live now at https://market.getcomputable.com: a block of nodes, August through the end of January. Bidding closes July 31. The bids are sealed. You bid how many nodes, which weeks, and your price. Every clearing price gets published after settlement, because nobody knows what a GPU week is worth and we want the prints to exist in public.

Happy to go deep in the comments on anything, including the clearing mechanism, which is a packing problem and was fun to design!

sentences.en: We spent years building trading infrastructure at Jump Trading and Coinbase.
sentences.zh: 我们花了数年时间在 Jump Trading 和 Coinbase 构建交易基础设施。

sentences.en: From that point of view, compute looks like energy markets before 2000: everything trades through private bilateral leases, there’s no visible price, and nothing can be resold.
sentences.zh: 从这个角度来看，计算看起来就像 2000 年之前的能源市场：一切都通过私人双边租赁进行交易，没有可见的价格，而且没有任何东西可以转售。

sentences.en: The same H100 rents at a 2x spread depending on who’s asking, and once you sign a 24-month lease, it can never change hands.
sentences.zh: 同一辆 H100 的租金价格为 2 倍，具体取决于谁提出要求，而且一旦您签署了 24 个月的租约，它就永远不会易手。

sentences.en: So we built a market for GPU nodes, sold by the calendar week.
sentences.zh: 因此，我们建立了一个 GPU 节点市场，按日历周销售。

sentences.en: Here are three things you can do on it that you can’t do anywhere else:
sentences.zh: 您可以在其中执行以下三项在其他地方无法执行的操作：

blocks.html_en: - Buy exactly the weeks you need. Three nodes for the last two weeks of October means you pay for those two weeks and walk away when the run is done. You don't have to commit to 6-24 months, and there's no flexibility premium.

sentences.en: - Buy exactly the weeks you need.
sentences.zh: - 准确购买您需要的周数。

sentences.en: Three nodes for the last two weeks of October means you pay for those two weeks and walk away when the run is done.
sentences.zh: 十月最后两周的三个节点意味着您需要支付这两周的费用，并在跑步结束后离开。

sentences.en: You don't have to commit to 6-24 months, and there's no flexibility premium.
sentences.zh: 您不必承诺 6-24 个月，而且没有灵活性溢价。

blocks.html_en: - Sell back what you don’t use. If your plans change, unused weeks turn back into cash: we keep a market quote posted on every position, so there’s always a price to hit.

sentences.en: - Sell back what you don’t use.
If your plans change, unused weeks turn back into cash: we keep a market quote posted on every position, so there’s always a price to hit.
sentences.zh: 如果您的计划发生变化，未使用的周数将变回现金：我们会在每个头寸上发布市场报价，因此总有一个价格可供选择。

blocks.html_en: - Buy (or sell) the future. Lock January in July at a price you set, so the cost of a future run is known before another 40% H100 rate jump makes it not.

sentences.zh: 将 1 月和 7 月的价格锁定在您设定的价格，这样，在 H100 利率再次上涨 40% 之前，未来运行的成本就已可知。

You bid how many nodes, which weeks, and your price. Every clearing price gets published after settlement, because nobody knows what a GPU week is worth and we want the prints to exist in public.

sentences.en: The first auction is live now at https://market.getcomputable.com: a block of nodes, August through the end of January.
sentences.zh: 第一次拍卖现已在 https://market.getcomputable.com 进行：从 8 月到 1 月底的一个节点块。
招标于 7 月 31 日截止。

sentences.en: You bid how many nodes, which weeks, and your price.
sentences.zh: 您可以竞标多少个节点、周数以及您的价格。

sentences.en: Every clearing price gets published after settlement, because nobody knows what a GPU week is worth and we want the prints to exist in public.
sentences.zh: 每个清算价格都会在结算后公布，因为没有人知道 GPU 一周的价值，而我们希望公开这些价格。

blocks.html_en: Happy to go deep in the comments on anything, including the clearing mechanism, which is a packing problem and was fun to design!

sentences.en: Happy to go deep in the comments on anything, including the clearing mechanism, which is a packing problem and was fun to design!
sentences.zh: 很高兴深入评论任何事情，包括清算机制，这是一个包装问题，设计起来很有趣！

content_html_zh:
嘿，我们是可计算的。 我们花了数年时间在 Jump Trading 和 Coinbase 构建交易基础设施。 从这个角度来看，计算看起来就像 2000 年之前的能源市场：一切都通过私人双边租赁进行交易，没有可见的价格，而且没有任何东西可以转售。 同一辆 H100 的租金价格为 2 倍，具体取决于谁提出要求，而且一旦您签署了 24 个月的租约，它就永远不会易手。

因此，我们建立了一个 GPU 节点市场，按日历周销售。 您可以在其中执行以下三项在其他地方无法执行的操作：

- 准确购买您需要的周数。 十月最后两周的三个节点意味着您需要支付这两周的费用，并在跑步结束后离开。 您不必承诺 6-24 个月，而且没有灵活性溢价。

- 卖回你不使用的东西。 如果您的计划发生变化，未使用的周数将变回现金：我们会在每个头寸上发布市场报价，因此总有一个价格可供选择。

- 购买（或出售）未来。 将 1 月和 7 月的价格锁定在您设定的价格，这样，在 H100 利率再次上涨 40% 之前，未来运行的成本就已可知。

第一次拍卖现已在 https://market.getcomputable.com 进行：从 8 月到 1 月底的一个节点块。 招标于 7 月 31 日截止。 投标已密封。 您可以竞标多少个节点、周数以及您的价格。 每个清算价格都会在结算后公布，因为没有人知道 GPU 一周的价值，而我们希望公开这些价格。

很高兴深入评论任何事情，包括清算机制，这是一个包装问题，设计起来很有趣！
